entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop studied for natural outcrossing and leaf morphology.

entities.name: SIMPLE LEAF
entities.description: A leaf morphology trait that is monogenically recessive to the compound leaf trait.

entities.name: COMPOUND LEAF
entities.description: The normal leaf morphology trait in chickpea.

entities.name: F2 SEGREGATES
entities.description: The second filial generation plants derived from crossing simple-leaved and compound-leaved material.

entities.name: F3 PLANTS
entities.description: The third filial generation progeny used to determine the rate of natural outcrossing.

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The breeding method used to create the F2 segregating populations.

entities.name: NATURAL OUTCROSSING
entities.description: The spontaneous pollination of plants by pollen from other individuals, assessed at 1.92%.

entities.name: MONOGENIC RECESSIVENESS
entities.description: The genetic inheritance pattern where a trait is controlled by a single gene and is recessive.
